metadata.title: Dark Dubstep Drops
metadata.description: Dark, aggressive dubstep radio edit (~3:05) with two contrasting drops — a classic 8n wobble in drop 1 and a 16n neuro growl in drop 2. F minor with horror bII tension in the second half. Buildups use 3-way round-robin hat samples and accent-patterned rolls to avoid machine-gun stutter.
